title: Square Feet to Square Meters Converter
description: Industrial-grade area conversion tool with precision adjustments, tolerance analysis, and data confidence scoring based on ISO 80000-1 and Six Sigma measurement standards.

inputs.label: Area in Square Feet
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be converted from imperial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total area to be converted from imperial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.

inputs.label: Measurement Accuracy Class
inputs.businessContext: Defines the tolerance level of the original measurement per ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Defines the tolerance level of the original measurement per ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.

inputs.label: Rounding Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the final result. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the final result. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.

inputs.label: Include Tolerance Band
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, the output will include upper and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, the output will include upper and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.

rules.message: Area must be greater than zero.
Area exceeds maximum allowed value (1,000,000 ft²).
Low accuracy measurements should not be rounded to more than 2 decimal places per ISO 80000-1.

thresholds.message: Low measurement accuracy detected. Consider re-measurement for critical applications.
Large area detected. Verify measurement method (e.g., laser vs tape) to avoid cumulative errors.
